items.text:
# ***CASTING CALL***

**LEKEN NY NORSK FILM OG SØKER FØLGENDE:**

**GUTT** - spillealder 12 (10-15 år oppfordres til å søke. Skuespillererfaring og piano ferdigheter er ikke et krav, men et pluss)

**KVINNER OG MENN** - 30-50 år

**MINDRE ROLLER/STATISTER** - alle kan søke

**CREW/BAK KAMERA **- Ønsker du å bidra med noe bak? - ta kontakt!

**HONORAR, TID OG STED:**
Opptak foregår i august/september i Oslo og omegn, fordelt på få dager.
– Hovedroller: honoreres (avtales individuelt).
– Mindre roller/statister: ulønnet, men vi dekker mat og reise, og holder opptaksdagene korte og effektive – vi respekterer tiden din.
Du blir en del av en proff produksjon med erfarne skuespillere.

Send mail til casting@lekenfilm.no med kort om deg og hvorfor du vil være med, og merk emnefelt i mail med:

GUTT/MANN/DAME + ALDER,

eller:

STATIST, CREW eller ANNET

Aktuelle kandidater kalles inn til audition i Juli.

HONORAR, TID OG STED:
Opptak foregår i august/september i Oslo og omegn, fordelt på få dager.
– Hovedroller: honoreres (avtales individuelt).
– Mindre roller/statister: ulønnet, men vi dekker mat og reise, og holder opptaksdagene korte og effektive – vi respekterer tiden din. Du blir en del av en proff produksjon med erfarne skuespillere. 

Spørsmål? Send mail!

Lykke til!

MERK EMNEFELTMED MED ALDER, EILER CREW, STATIST ELLER ANNET'

items.text:
CASTING CALL!!
Non-union indie short film based in Vancouver, British Columbia.
Around 11 pages long.

Volunteer.
Food and credits provided.

Shooting around August 19-24th 2026.

LOGLINE
It's 1892 in Nova Scotia. Blythe, used to isolation, shifts her time for her new friend she meets, Agatha. Though as she gets to know her through their imaginative play, she realizes her friends dark family history may reveal the truth of their friendship.

CHARACTERS

⭐️Blythe - Lead
18-25 years old
European or African/Black ethnicities

Blythe is a passionate girl, in touch with nature and her textile abilities.
She has dreams of living in the city, though is stuck at her home duties with her mom. She is a caregiver, finds glee and beauty in everything, though her isolation makes it difficult for her to speak up for herself.

⭐️Agatha - Lead
18-25 years old
European ethnicity 

Agatha is a curious girl, as isolated in life as Blythe. Her family lives with a community, running things that would be illegal and viewed as sinister in a regular society. She is intrigued by Blythe and wants to include her in her community. Agatha is devoted, friendly, and offers a commanding presence.

⭐️Mary - Supporting (6 lines of dialogue)
35-55 years old
European or African/Black ethnicities

Stubborn, traditional, blunt, but also caring. She has a lot of responsibility on the farm and taking care of the kids while her husband works as a loyalist.

⭐️Henry - NO DIALOGUE
8-12 years old
European or African/Black ethnicities

Quiet and introverted. Is responsible for his age and respects his mother’s duties.

PLEASE CONTACT jessicabresciani@my.capilanou.ca WITH YOUR HEADSHOT, DEMO REEL AND RESUME IF INTERESTED.

items.text:
Update: Booking form now fixed.

Liverpool's Royal Court are hosting monthly actors workshops, covering a range of topics from audition technique to sense memory. Workshops are competitively priced and group sizes are kept small, ensuring all attendees get excellent one-to-one guidance and feedback.

[https://liverpoolsroyalcourt.com/](https://liverpoolsroyalcourt.com/studio)
items.previewDescription: Royal Court Liverpool is the friendliest theatre in the city. With pre-show dining and a range of drinks served before and after the show, a trip to The Court is night of great entertainment.

sharedPost.text:
🎬 Exclusive 1-on-1 Acting Workshop (Online)shorter version.

This is a practical, immersive acting course designed to help you become truthful, emotionally connected, and confident on camera.

I’m a British Cinematographer/Director with 30+ years experience and 30+ feature films, working with actors across the world.

🎯 What you’ll gain:• Real emotional depth (not “pretend acting”)• Strong, believable performances on camera• Understanding how film sets actually work• Confidence working with directors and crew• Material for your showreel

🎭 How it works (4 sessions):We focus on:• Moment-to-moment acting• Emotional connection & character work• Camera technique & performance• Real scene work + feedback

Everything is practical and tailored to you—not theory.

💰 4 sessions (1 hour each)Total: $200

This isn’t about tricks—it’s about truth in performance.

If you’re serious about acting, this will change how you approach it.

Let me know if you’d like to start 👍

items.text:
🎬 We're Hiring: Korean Language Coach (Los Angeles) 🇰🇷

Language Academia is looking for a Korean Language Coach to join our growing team!

We're looking for someone who loves teaching, enjoys being on camera, and is excited to help create engaging educational content for students around the world.

This role includes:

• One-on-one and group Korean coaching

• Creating and adapting lesson materials

• Filming YouTube and social media content

• Opportunities to coach actors and performers

• Flexible scheduling (online and in-person)

We're looking for someone who:

• Is a native or near-native Korean speaker

• Can teach beginner through advanced Korean

• Has strong English skills

• Is comfortable on camera

• Has an Associate degree or higher in a related field (Language, Linguistics, Korean Studies, Anthropology, History, Performance Arts, etc.)

Bonus if you have:

• Acting or performance experience

• Teaching or tutoring experience

• Speak three or more languages

• Knowledge of Korean regional dialects and accents

If you're passionate about language, culture, education, and media, we'd love to hear from you!

📍 Los Angeles area ONLY

Email your headshot and resume to support@languageacademia.com

Meet the team you are joining: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL7CfzLB3V-oZDHzVkdjLryApPbUWLL6Cx

sharedPost.text:
After two more performances of **Scrum Down To Murder** and a final outing for Matthew Fray's original comedy **Just Business**, it's time to loosen your corsets, lower your expectations of good behaviour, and prepare for...**Beyond The Fray!**

 

**Only 4  seats left!** 

Our **1 August** performance at **Medway Little Theatre, Rochester** is teetering on the edge of a **SELL OUT** – and every penny from ticket sales goes to **AMMF – the Cholangiocarcinoma Charity**, helping fund vital research and raise awareness of this rare cancer.

🚨 **ONLY 4 SEATS LEFT!** 🚨

Fancy a night of laughter, outrageous characters and jokes that are only *mostly* in good taste?

Then join us at **Medway Little Theatre, Rochester** on **1st August** for **Beyond The Fray** — a gloriously silly comedy revue packed with:

😂 Blink-and-you'll-miss-them one-liners
🤣 Quick-fire sketches
🙈 Shameless innuendo
😲 Ridiculous characters
😬 Puns so dreadful they're somehow brilliant

Presented by **Alternate Shadows**, the show features the work of Medway writer **Matthew Fray**, whose credits include *The Sketch Show*, *Smack the Pony*, *TV To Go* and *The Griff Rhys Jones Show*.

Before the curtain goes up, don't forget to visit **The Wee Gift Shop** and pick up something special while supporting a wonderful cause.

🕢 **Curtain up: 7.30pm**
🎟️ **Just FOUR seats remain!**

Book through TicketSource now before someone beats you to them.

Come for the comedy. Support a fantastic cause. Leave with aching cheeks and a lighter heart.

**Everybody wins... especially your funny bone.**

items.text:
Haven't posted on here for a while, but this one felt worth shouting about... (excuse the pun! 😅)

We're bringing **US Casting Director Lana Veenker** to **London** for an exclusive two-day intensive, and she's only here for a very limited time.

If you're an actor looking to break into the American market—or simply want to learn from one of the best—this is a brilliant opportunity. Lana's credits include **Twilight** (Oregon Casting), **Pretty Little Liars** (Northwest Casting), and over **350 episodes of television**, and she'll be sharing practical insight into auditioning for U.S. productions, finding American projects filming in the UK and Europe, and building an international career.

More details and tickets via the link below:

[https://buytickets.at/runatitshouting/2117925](https://buytickets.at/runatitshouting/2117925)

sharedPost.text:
🇬🇧✨ London actors – don’t miss this! 𝗨𝗦 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗗𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿 𝗟𝗮𝗻𝗮 𝗩𝗲𝗲𝗻𝗸𝗲𝗿 is coming to London for a series of exclusive Run At It Shouting workshops, giving you the chance to gain invaluable insight into breaking into the International film and TV industry.

Known for casting on Twilight (Oregon Casting) and Pretty Little Liars (Northwest Casting), Lana has also cast over 350 episodes of television, including Grimm, Trinkets, American Vandal, Leverage and The Librarians.

Whether you’re looking to break into the U.S. market or sharpen your audition skills, this workshop will cover:

🎬 What it’s really like to audition for U.S. film & TV projects
🌍 How to find American productions shooting in the UK & Europe
🎭 What U.S. casting directors are looking for
✈️ How to prepare for artist visas and international opportunities

🎬 2-DAY INTENSIVE

🗓️ 15 & 16 July
⏰ 10:00 – 17:00
📍 RAIS Southwark

🎬 1-DAY WORKSHOP

🗓️ 14 July
⏰ 10:00 – 17:00
📍 RAIS Southwark

🎟️ Book your place now via the links in our bio!

✨ Run At It Shouting Members receive 10% OFF all courses, plus access to exclusive member perks.

LET’S RUN AT IT SHOUTING 🔥

.
.
.
.
.

#RunAtItShouting #LanaVeenker #CastingDirector #ScreenActing #ActorsUK

sharedPost.text:
OUT NOW !!!

BEYOND OBSESSION - In my blood (CD / Digital)
SCAN 322
EAN : 4251896116238
Scanner / Dark Dimensions Label Group
Release Date : 26.06.26

Available Here :

https://orcd.co/in-my-blood-2

Videolinks :

In my Blood (Official Music Video)

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DBZOhJz5r6c

You're not my Lover (Official Music Video)

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=x-E2a7kWyp0

Info (German) :

Mit ihrem neuen Album IN MY BLOOD liefern Beyond Obsession den bisher intensivsten Soundtrack ihrer Karriere. 
Zwischen dunkler Melancholie, kalter Elektronik und großen emotionalen Hooks bewegt sich das Duo irgendwo zwischen Synthpop, Darkwave und modernem Electropop.

IN MY BLOOD ist ein Album über Obsession, Verlust, Sehnsucht und die Dinge, die man nicht mehr aus seinem Kopf bekommt. 

Pulsierende Synthesizer treffen auf treibende Beats, fragile Momente auf hymnische Refrains. 
Jeder Song zieht tiefer hinein in eine Welt aus Neonlicht, schlaflosen Nächten und emotionalen Extremen.

Musikalisch verbindet das Album klassische Synthpop-Einflüsse mit einem modernen, druckvollen Sounddesign. 
Fans von düsteren 80s-Vibes, emotionalen Vocals und cineastischer Atmosphäre kommen hier voll auf ihre Kosten.

Nach mehreren Singles und wachsender Aufmerksamkeit auf Streaming-Plattformen zeigt IN MY BLOOD eine Band, die ihren eigenen Stil konsequent weiterentwickelt hat: emotional, intensiv und kompromisslos ehrlich.

Dieses Album ist kein Blick zurück.

Es ist ein Blick direkt unter die Haut.

Info International :

With their new album IN MY BLOOD, Beyond Obsession deliver the most intense and emotional release of their career so far. 
Moving between dark melancholy, cold electronics and massive hooks, the duo blends synthpop, darkwave and modern electropop into a powerful sonic experience.

IN MY BLOOD is an album about obsession, loss, desire and the things you can never fully escape from. 
Pulsating synthesizers meet driving beats, fragile moments collide with anthemic choruses. Every track pulls the listener deeper into a world of neon lights, sleepless nights and emotional extremes.

Musically, the album combines classic synth-driven influences with a modern and powerful production style. 
Fans of dark 80s atmospheres, emotional vocals and cinematic soundscapes will feel right at home.

Following several successful singles and growing attention on streaming platforms, IN MY BLOOD shows a band pushing their sound further than ever before: emotional, intense and unapologetically honest.

This album is not about looking back.
It goes straight beneath the skin.

TRACKLIST :

01. LEAVE ME
02. YOU'RE NOT MY LOVER
03. IN MY BLOOD
04. DEIN HERZ
05. INTO THE DEEP
06. SUGAR KILLS
07. DEADLINE
08. LINES OF YOUR FACE
09. ITS THE VOID WE SHARE
10. I'LL TAKE THE PAIN

FOLLOW BEYOND OBSESSION :

http://Linktr.ee/beyondobsession

FOLLOW DARK DIMENSIONS :

https://linktr.ee/darkdimensions

#BeyondObsession #Electro #Electronic #DarkDimensions #Scanner #DarkWave #Remix #Wave #Pop #SynthPop #Industrial #DarkElectro #Industrial #Harsh #EBM #Aggrotech #Lover #InMyBlood

**CASTING CALL — LOOKING FOR MODELS**

Looking for models for a creative photoshoot in Los Angeles

If you’re interested in lifestyle, luxury, events, or social media content, we’d love to connect with you and create something beautiful together.

**DM on IG: @betinaherrera._**
Email: betinaherrera.usa@gmail.com

Please send your Instagram + sample photos/previous shoots.

Can’t wait to work with you and bring your style to life.

items.text:
🎬 Calling all Metro Detroit actors!
I’m looking to cast my Motion Picture Institute thesis short film, Project Seaside, shooting July 16–19.

If you’re interested (or know someone who might be), check out the slides below and shoot me a DM! I’d love to send you the audition sides.

Feel free to share this with anyone who might be a good fit. ❤️

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'CASTING CALL!!! MOTION PIOTURE INSTITUTE STUDENT SHORT FILM YOUR MEALS PROVIDED GREAT FOOTAGE FOR REEL FUN, COLLABORATION, CREATIVE ENVIRONMENT **UNPAID FOR EXPERIENCI'
May be an image of text that says 'LOOKING FORI ADAM HINKLEY: MALE, 20S 20 AVA: FEMALE, 20S DR. BRIAN MCKINNEY: MALE, 30S-60S ALL ROLES HAVE SPEAKING PARTS* TS*'

May be a graphic of text that says '"PROJECT SEASIDE" PLOT: Adam is a young man struggling to move on after the end of his relationship with his ex-girlfriend, Ava. Hoping for a fresh start, he enrolls in an experimental program called Project Seaside, run by the charismatic Dr. Brian McKinney, who promises a revolutionary way to leave the past behind. But as Adam progresses through the treatment, he begins to realize the program may be changin far more than he ever intended.'
May be an image of text that says 'SHOOTING DATES: JULY 16-19TH METRO DETROIT AREA AUDITION SIDES READY!! DM FOR SIDES AND MORE INFO :)'

items.text:
🎬 Join Syracuse International Film Festival for an exciting day of animation at The Palace Theatre Syracuse! 🎥✨

📅 Date: Sunday, October 4, 2026📍 Location: 2384 James St., Syracuse, NY 13206
Experience "All About the Animations: 35 mm to Digital!" with a full schedule of screenings, panels, and more! 

🕙 Doors open at 10:15 AM🎞️ Watch innovative short films by international filmmakers, including Germany, Canada, and more!🗣️ Q&A with filmmakers at 12:45 PM🍽️ Lunch Break at 1:15 PM🎬 The Animation Show on 35 mm at 3:30 PM🎉 

Plus, special screenings of "Dobrina," "Prison and Time," "Hell," "Angry Girl Apartment," and more!

Don't miss this celebration of animation history and creativity!

#AnimationEvent #FilmFestivalOpportunity #syracuseny #thepalacetheatre #35mmtodigital #viralpost #capcut #beavisandbutt #beavis #BeavisAndButthead #VisitSyracuse

items.text:
Szanowni Państwo
Pracuję w branży medycznej. Mam miły głos, dobrą dykcję. Szybko uczę się nowych rzeczy. Chętnie podejmę dodatkową rolę statysty, epizodysty w dobrym filmie lub wystąpię w reklamie, spocie jakiegoś poważniejszego przedsięwzięcia, dobrego produktu. Podejmę rolę w spocie o tematyce świątecznej, medycznej lub promującej edukację.

items.text:
SERIAL INTERNETOWY 

**12.07.2026 Niedziela  Warszawa  Czas trwania około 3 godzin**

Panowie 25 - 35 lat ( atrakcyjny, przystojny dobrze zbudowany, typ modela do 1 sceny - scena z odsłoniętą klatką piersiową )

**STAWKA 300 zł**

Panowie 35 - 50 lat (Typ biznesmena, rola mówiona, krótkie kwestie w dwóch scenach. Połączy się z nami na zoomie, nie musi przyjeżdżać. Ważne żeby był w koszuli z krawatem lub koszuli i marynarce i jakoś wyglądał poważnie.

**STAWKA 300 zł**

Zgłoszenia ( imię i nazwisko, wiek ,wzrost, aktualne zdjęcie twarzy oraz sylwetki, oraz nr. tel. proszę przesłać na adres

**jarek.drzycimski@podtytulem.pl** z dopiskiem w tytule** SI**

items.text:
„Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujących ról:

1. Igor Czarnecki (19) – chudy, typ zbuntowanego nastolatka. 
Data: 14 i 18.07
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość 

2. Podejrzany (25) – mężczyzna ścigany przez detektywów, 
w dobrej formie
Data: 15.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

3. Mężczyzna 3 (30) – przy kasie, sportowa elegancja 
Data: 16.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

4. Mężczyzna 2 (31) – klient motelu, typ biznesmena, obrączka. 
Data: 16.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto 

5. Detektyw (34) – prywatny detektyw; okulary, dłuższe włosy. 
Data: 15.07
Stawka: 400 zł netto

6. Strażnik Miejski 1 (36)  
Daty: 13.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

7. Strażnik Miejski 2 (38)
Daty: 13.07
Stawka: 300 zł netto 

8. Mężczyzna 1 (40) – tylko ciało, typ biznesmena lub przedsiębiorcy. Obrączka. EPIZOD - TYLKO CIAŁO 
Data: 15.07 i 16.07
Stawka: 600 zł netto za całość 

9. Mundurowy 1 (41) 
Daty: 13 i 14.07
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

media.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎'স্টার ইনস্টিটিউট অফ অযক্টিং স্বপ্ন আপনার, দায়িত্ব আমাদের! বিশেষ্ অফার: কোর্স চলাকালীন নিশ্চিত কাজের সুযোগ! ভর্তি ফি ভর্তিফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- لاسل মাসিক ফি মাত্র ₹৫০০/- অনলাইন এবং অফলাইন কোর্স ১০০% কাজের সুযোগ (ফিচার ফিলা, ওয়েব সিরিজ, সিরিয়াল) থিওুরি এবং প্রযাটিক্যাল শিক্ষা গুণী শিল্পীদের সান্নিধ্যে প্রশিক্ষণ ভিড় না হারিয়ে, নিজেকে গড়ে তুলুন STAR OF INSTITUTE ACTING ভর্তির জন্য যোগাযোগ করুন C 9432846525 হোয়াটসঅ্যাপ: 9432846525‎'‎

Do nowego odcinka serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PAŃ:

- Dagmara Lipińska (28) –  Kosmetyczka. Kobieta wyrachowana, lubiąca wykorzystywać mężczyzn. Zadbana. 5 scen

DATA: 16.07
STAWKA: 600 zł netto
 

- Hanna Kowalewska (35) – Cwaniara, której najbardziej zależy na pieniądzach.  2 sceny 
OBOWIĄZKOWE PRAWO JAZDY!!!

DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

- Siostra Artura (34) – Katarzyna Gazda, siostra Artura zatroskana o jego los. Pracuje w korporacji. 1 scena

DATA: 16.07
STAWKA: 400 zł netto

 
- Dorota (16) – nastolatka. Skryta, z natury buntowniczka. Ubiera się na czarno, oversizeowo. 1 scena 

DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

- Emilia (17) – nastolatka, przyjaciółka Doroty. Ubiera się modnie, krzykliwie, w stylu nastolatków. Emocjonalna i gadatliwa. 
 1 scena 

DATA: 17.07
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia WYŁĄCZNIE MAILOWO na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu

- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
🎬 LOS ANGELES FILM CREW & PRODUCTION VOLUNTEERS NEEDED – JULY 31
We’re currently building our production team for a professionally filmed, broadcast-quality awards gala taking place on Friday, July 31 in Inglewood, CA.

This is an opportunity to gain hands-on experience on a high-caliber, multi-camera live production while supporting an incredible cause. The evening will feature celebrity honorees, VIP guests, live musical performances, and cinematic video elements, with proceeds benefiting scholarships and educational opportunities for underserved students and families throughout Los Angeles.

We’re looking for experienced professionals, recent graduates, and advanced college students interested in the following roles:

• Production Manager

• Stage Manager

• Assistant Stage Manager

• Video Director / Switcher Operator (experienced)

• Camera Operator

• Playback / Graphics Operator

• Audio Assistant

• Lighting Technician

• Event Photographer

• Social Media Content Creator

• VIP / Talent Coordinator

• Production Assistants / Runners

Crew Details

📍 Inglewood, CA

📅 Friday, July 31

🕒 Crew Call: Approximately 3:00 PM

💻 One mandatory virtual production meeting prior to the event (scheduled around crew availability)

What You’ll Receive

✅ Professional production credit for your résumé/portfolio

✅ Hands-on experience on a large-scale live event

✅ Networking with experienced production and event professionals

✅ Meals provided

✅ Parking provided

Limited stipends may be available for select specialized technical positions based on experience.

If you’re interested, please email tdninvestmentgroups@gmail.com with:

* Your résumé

* A brief summary of your experience

* Production credits and/or portfolio (if available)

* The position(s) you’re interested in

* Your contact information

We’re looking for passionate, dependable team members who want to contribute to a meaningful event while gaining valuable live production experience. We look forward to hearing from you!

topComments.text: I am interested. Please reach out

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I’ve just completed my first year studying Digital Film Production at Birmingham City University.

I’m looking for any opportunity to get experience on professional film sets. I’m happy to start in any trainee, assistant or entry-level crew role. My goal is to learn, work hard and build my career in the film industry.

I'm based in Birmingham and can travel to London, Manchester, Liverpool and across the Midlands.

Portfolio: [donetskiy.myportfolio.com](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fdonetskiy.myportfolio.com%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExaGtRRFBQUjVQNHJZZjFGanNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR73MoSR8BclLn2kEnGD21qU5j-CN4bZY5pPyEj2_kQwGi0NYlcfU1Ht8Dj5Ow_aem_ysKxq-wTyM3SKQOyp1zvYg&h=AUAdUE2E7v9dz0_4PopbVBefRLXtq5fntuKUKq23abOCjpLZPWAC5JnqhUqZKRLQyrsBj7xJCeWoQxDfYpWUGSQqAQvUWByqbqnQ5WCAhvQh5wCQhAUwlaHIMeJ98vF9HU3UeLnzLUL0AoR8&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AUADjSDyyXH4hiCV_eSRwGncu36jmIc2GHdSUbnqIa6-UGsgr-_pSKVCGQ35elCUY6FGk6nRlY4f_2iLvKeN17oJGYIv4uS-pxDj_TDni2zEQxI8YMw9l0eIV4RBeJlz7ukMzUZONGOPohyImk3ez-qOI9uvs7PocpjP51Wj)

Looking for new opportunities!
Dear friends,

I am currently looking for work as a professional ballet dancer.

If you know of any theatres, dance companies, event agencies, show productions, opera houses, cruise productions, or other projects looking for a ballerina, I would be very grateful for any recommendations or contacts.

I am a professional ballet and contemporary dancer, open to performances, productions, events, and creative collaborations.

Please feel free to message me or share this post. Thank you so much! 🤍

items.text:
**Casting Call- Need Background Actors **

I'm casting for a comedy short film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. 

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**

People in Bar/Background artists- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 5 women and 5 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on either 11th or 12th July.

**Shoot Location:** Vancouver Downtown

**Date:** 11th and 12th July, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

items.text:
CASTING CALL 

Live action Fan Film of EPIC: The Musical (A rendition of The Odyssey)

With nearly 1 Million YouTube views on the first project, my crew and I are embarking on the next endeavor! 

This is a fan made passion project. Roles are volunteer and non-union with food, costumes, and nerdy vibes provided. 

Dates: September TBD, based on actor availability. Time commitment will be 1-5 days depending on role. 

Roles needed: male 18-35
* General background: Ancient Greek men (ethnicity does not matter for this project)
* stunts for small fight scene (great for your demo reel if you're looking to get started! Training provided if needed)
* lip syncing lines and dramatic deaths for key characters (see form for details)

For all details and more information on the project, please see the audition link: https://forms.gle/tyoNfZgnx7Zq3dtEA

For a look at the past project, check it out here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=99bRYplIKPM

Please note! This is a project made by nerds, for nerds. We are creating some really cool projects with high production value, but at the end of the day this is not for profit and is meant to bring together actors, cosplayers, and film makers to just have fun on set.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ODYSSEUS cMy CASTING CALL ROLES NEEDED: SUITORS •ANTINOUS EURYMACHUS AMPHINOMUS MELANTHIUS PALACE MAIDS SUITORS (WITH STUNTS) Join me for the grand finale ofthe EPIC ν Projects! 'Odysseus' will be action packed, covered (fake) blood, and have enough brooding to last 20 years. This project all hands deck and youp chance to get involved and die dramati death! Vancouver BC Canada Must be 18+ Filming September 2026 (Dates TBD)'

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
Casting Call (Non-Union) for ACTORS WITH EXPERIENCE IN THE HEALTHCARE SYSTEM, ALL AGES AND DEMOGRAPHICS, INCLUDING COUPLES AND FAMILIES - Paid

Looking for actors to play the role of patients and families in a hospital/nursing setting. The video clips will be used in an online training system for nurses counsellors. The session includes a prepared character backgrounds and scripted language/prompts with some improvising.

All ages, all gender expressions/identities, all ethnicities, and persons with disabilities are welcome. 

All experience levels with acting are welcome to apply. We are committed to making this a respectful and safe process, with open communication and respect for boundaries.

Comfortable English fluency is required.

We are strongly committed to authenticity in our educational portrayals, so it's preferred that actors match specific cultural backgrounds and gender identities/expressions, have some experience with hospitalization and medical treatment, and where indicated, some experience with or around certain medical conditions. 

Expected filming date is July 26, but our needs are ongoing and more will occur in the future, so please submit if you're interested at all.

Location is BCIT Burnaby Campus. Pay is $400 CAD, with the expectation of up to a half day on location. This rate is intended to compensate for both location time and prep time.

At this time, we are casting a variety of roles, including:

Cisgender woman of color, age 50-60, heavyset, preferably with past experiences of medical hospitalization and/or ER visits

Transmasc / trans man, age 18-25 (all other demographics are acceptable) with experience navigating the healthcare system

Child (age 5-10 or can realistically play that age) and their parent (all other demographics are acceptable). Ideally a real parent/child pair. Though not a must-have, it would be nice to recruit a parent/child dyad who have had their own experiences in the past of being hospitalized due to a medical issue so they can draw on those experiences for our improv cases.

Black/Afro-Canadian/African American (Sub-saharan African and/or Afro-Latino ethnicity) cisgender man, age 18-30

Good To Have: Personal History of/Familiarity with Sickle Cell Anemia (either as a patient themself or family member)

Indigenous (specific nation membership or community identity preferred), age 50-60, cisgender man, preferably heavyset. Personal history of diabetes preferred though not necessary.

Couple, age 60-70, white, cisgender woman (the patient) and her husband. Ideally, a real husband/wife couple. Actor will be portraying a patient with a history of breast cancer who broke her hip and presented to the ER. Imaging reveals her cancer has return and her prognosis is terminal.

Nurse 1: Cisgender woman (all other demographics acceptable). Preferably an actual nurse, nursing student, or someone with healthcare practitioner experience

Nurse 2: Cisgender man (all other demographics acceptable). Preferably an actual nurse, nursing student, or someone with healthcare practitioner experience

Attending Physician: White, cisgender man, age 35-60. Preferably with healthcare practitioner experience.

Please email [phil@skillsetter.com](mailto:phil@skillsetter.com) with your headshots and resume, as well as some information about you, such as gender identity, age, cultural/racial background. If you've submitted for a past session, you're welcome to submit again. We do often receive more submissions than we are able to respond to, but we do read them all, and we do save your submissions for future consideration.

Coming soon to The Hope Street Theatre from 22-24th October  'BUBBLES' The story of France's Kray, written by me and directed by Anthony Proctor  

Set in sixties London Frances was the wife of Reggie Kray, brother of Ronnie the notorious East End criminals, this is her tragic story...

'BUBBLES' is the follow up to 'TEA WITH VIOLET 

We will shortly begin auditioning for our cast. 

We are looking for actress's 16 - 30 to play young Francis 

And actors 18- 35 to play the male characters 

Please message me with a photograph and contact details if you would like to audition for the roles 

Auditions will be held Week Beginning 27th July in Liverpool City Centre

Tickets for 'BUBBLES' on sale now 

https://bit.ly/4d9tgkb

BACKGROUND PERFORMERS CASTING CALL

’’MARGHERITA PIZZA’’

We are students at Algonquin College in the Film & Media Production program looking for background performers for funeral scenes in our 10-minute short sci-fi film called “Margherita Pizza”.

 The scenes are shot in Kenmore, Ontario on July 8th, 2026, around 9:30am to 12:30pm. Attire of black or dark clothing is preferred.

 This project is unpaid and snacks will be available on set for everyone.

 Please contact Erik Finlin if you are interested or for further information.

   finl0057@algonquinlive.com

Broken Boys by Liam David Malcolm - 7.30pm on August 14th - 16th @ The Hen and Chicken Theatre 💔👬
Broken Boys by Liam David Malcolm - 7.30pm on August 14th - 16th @ The Hen and Chicken Theatre 💔👬

Set somewhere in the UK, two schoolboys - Tom and Michael - couldn't be more different. Tom wants to be seen as a man, whilst Michael wants to be seen as anything but. One secret, changing room encounters sparks a complex relationship that spans 12 years, 2 schools, 1 pandemic and a fateful day in 2029 that changes lives forever. 

Audiences love Broken Boys! Get your tickets whilst you can for our 2026 Camden Fringe run ‼️

Website Link : https://camdenfringe.com/events/broken-boys/
Instagram : @brokenboyscamden

items.text:
🎉👰🤵 Niech dzieci mają swoje małe wesele… a dorośli spokojnie bawią się do rana! 🥳✨

Organizujesz wesele, poprawiny lub inną uroczystość? Zadbamy o najmłodszych gości, tworząc dla nich wyjątkową strefę pełną atrakcji! 🎈🎨🍿

🌟 Oferujemy:
🏰 Dmuchańce
🎭 Animacje i zabawy
🎯 Gry i konkursy
🍿 Świeży popcorn
🍭 Pyszną watę cukrową
😊 I mnóstwo uśmiechu!

💛 Dbamy o bezpieczeństwo dzieci i świetną atmosferę, dzięki czemu rodzice mogą w pełni cieszyć się zabawą i wspólnym świętowaniem.

🎊 Każdą ofertę przygotowujemy indywidualnie i dopasowujemy do Waszego budżetu.

📩 Napisz do nas w wiadomości prywatnej na Facebooku

📧 lub na adres: [promocjeevents@gmail.com](mailto:promocjeevents@gmail.com)

📅 Sprawdź dostępne terminy już dziś!

#Wesele #AtrakcjeDlaDzieci #AnimacjeDlaDzieci #Dmuchańce #WataCukrowa #Popcorn #WeseleZDziećmi #ImprezyOkolicznościowe #PromocjeEvents

items.text:
CASTING CALL
LEKEN LAGER NY NORSK FILM OG SØKER FØLGENDE:

GUTT - spillealder 12 (10-15 år oppfordres til å søke. Skuespillererfaring og piano ferdigheter er ikke et krav, men et pluss)

DAMER OG MENN - 30-50 år

MINDRE ROLLER/STATISTER - alle kan søke

CREW/BAK KAMERA - Ønsker du å bidra med noe bak? - ta kontakt!

Send mail til casting@lekenfilm.no med kort om deg og hvorfor du vil være med, og merk emnefelt i mail med:
GUTT/MANN/DAME + ALDER,
eller: 
STATIST, CREW eller ANNET

Aktuelle kandidater kalles inn til audition i Juli. Lykke til!

SEEKING HOSPITALITY STAFF FOR Vanderpump Villa on Hulu! 

Casting is ongoing! Are you ready to work under the guidance of globally acclaimed celebrity and hospitality mogul Lisa Vanderpump?

Bunim Murray Productions & Creative Content Group are seeking standout, polished, high-energy talent with real hospitality experience for Hulu’s Vanderpump Villa in the following roles:

Executive Chef - Sous Chef - Cook - Fine Dining Server - Bartender - Event Coordinator - Guest Services - Activities Director - Housekeeper

If you possess the drive, passion, and expertise required, seize the moment and apply now. Visit www.bmp51casting.com/staff to apply, or click the button below:

QUESTIONS? CONTACT THE CASTING TEAM AT TALENT@CCGCASTING.COM.

items.text:
# [KRAKÓW] PROWADZĄCA / WSPÓŁTWÓRCA PODCASTU WIDEO
## **Tworzę w Krakowie profesjonalny, kobiecy kanał podcastowy (gdzie pod wspólnym, silnym szyldem funkcjonują różne autorskie pasma). Zamiast budować małe kanały od zera, łączymy siły, krzyżujemy widownie i rośniemy wielokrotnie szybciej.**

Szukam do tego projektu współtwórczyń, które chcą poprowadzić swój własny, niezależny format.

**Jak wygląda nasz podział ról?**
* **Twoja działka:** Jesteś jedyną twarzą, głosem i szefową swojego formatu. Dostajesz własną playlistę. Wchodzisz do studia i skupiasz się wyłącznie na rozmowie. Zapraszasz gości, dzielisz się wiedzą i budujesz swoją markę osobistą.
* **Moja działka (Produkcja i Technologia):** Pełnię rolę Twojego producenta i realizatora. Zdejmuję z Ciebie 100% technicznego stresu. Dysponuje studiem wideo (wielokamerowy system na pełnoklatkowych aparatach Lumix, miksery ATEM). Ogarniam też przygotowanie krótkich form (Shorts, Reels) do promocji.

**Model biznesowy (Zasady 50/50):**

Nie płacisz mi za wynajem studia ani za sprzęt. Budujemy wspólne przedsięwzięcie i dzielimy się zyskami wygenerowanymi bezpośrednio przez Twoje odcinki (przychody z YouTube, kontrakty sponsorskie w Twoim formacie, lokowania) dokładnie po połowie (50/50). Ty masz program bez wkładu finansowego, ja inwestuję swój sprzęt i wiedzę w nasz wspólny sukces.

Żeby sprawdzić nasze biznesowe dopasowanie przed kamerą, współpracę zaczniemy od krótkiego sezonu pilotażowego.

**CZEGO WYMAGAM NA START (Przeczytaj uważnie):**

Zależy mi na kobietach, które podchodzą do swoich pomysłów z pełnym profesjonalizmem. Jeśli widzisz w tym potencjał, wyślij mi wiadomość prywatną. Oczekuję maksymalnego konkretu. Twoja aplikacja musi opisywać:
* **Format i tematykę:** Jaki dokładnie podcast chcesz prowadzić i do kogo ma trafiać? (Ważna uwaga: dbając o bezpieczeństwo i profesjonalizm kanału, omijamy tematy mocno polaryzujące, takie jak ostra polityka, skrajne wojny płci, internetowe dramy czy niesprawdzona pseudonauka).
* **Twarde kompetencje:** Dlaczego to właśnie Ty powinnaś o tym mówić? Wymagam jasnego potwierdzenia Twojej wiedzy (wykształcenie, doświadczenie zawodowe, zrealizowane projekty lub biznes).
* **Bazę gości:** Czy masz własną sieć kontaktów (znajomych, współpracowników, ekspertów), których od razu będziesz w stanie zaprosić do udziału w swoim programie?

Połączmy Twoją wiedzę z moją produkcją. Stwórzmy razem miejsce, gdzie dobre, kobiece rozmowy dostaną zasięgi, na jakie zasługują. Czekam na Twoją wiadomość!

Looking for couples to be killed by Winnie The Pooh!!!
Hello, i am needing a few couples to be killed by Winnie the pooh. In total, I new 4 pairs of couples who can participate in this film. 

Filming dates: July 3 to the 10th

Compensation: None, but will be happy to send back the clips we've filmed for your reel.

Location: Fort Collins Colorado 

Send me a message if you are interested!! I am accepting actual couples or two individuals who can protray a couple!

items.summary:
Casting Director Monika Dalman!

Our old friend Monika is coming to play! We're interviewing her for our Free Acting Class Tuesday at 8:30 pm 

REGISTER HERE: https://www.screenactingschool.com/opt-in-1

-11 SAG shows in the pipeline

-Leading expert and casting director for verticals

-Casts all over the world
-Producer
-Parent of 2 successful young actors (who do well in school)
-Author (2 books)

I’d want to meet Monika just to find out how she does it all and does it well.

Actors - find out exactly what she looks for in an audition.

See you on Tuesday!

Wir wünschen uns so sehr, daß sich jemand aus dem Postleitzahlenbereich 172-- meldet, damit wir endlich eine komplette Combo sind.
Ü60 passt am besten zu uns ;) 
Bitte PN. Daaankeeee :)

items.text:
HEY YOU'RE INVITED! 
Looking for guests to join our next LIVE PODCAST of 
“CAN'T MAKE THIS UP” 
Episode 3: Leap of Faith
We're searching for:
🎨 Artists
🎵 Musicians
🎬 Creators
🎤 Comedians, Storytellers, Entrepreneurs

Everyday people with unbelievable stories
If you have a journey, a lesson, a wild experience, or a unique perspective, we'd love to hear from you! This is a great opportunity to share your story, promote your work, and connect with creatives from around the world.

Monday at 7 PM PST / 10 PM EST 
🌍 Join FREE anywhere!

To be considered, email  “GUEST" with:
• Your name
• Short bio
• Social media links

icantmakethisupodcast@gmail.com

Follow us on IG
@icantmakethisupodcast

Let's take a leap of faith together... because sometimes the storries you *can't make up* are the ones that inspire us the most…

items.text:
👽**Casting for an upcoming MA student short film!**👽

MA Filmmaking students at MMU are creating our final project, filming in Leeds 14th-16th August.

The role is unpaid but expenses (food, travel, accomodation) will be covered.

Looking to fill the role of JESSIE - a female/non-binary actor, playing age late teens, comfortable with a Yorkshire accent.

Please read the additional info below and send headshots/showreel if available to **milliemaeperkins@gmail.com** if interested!

Thank you!

items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

MA Filmmaking students at MMU are creating our final project, filming in Leeds 14th-16th August.

The role is unpaid but expenses (food, travel, accomodation) will be covered.

Looking to fill the role of JESSIE - a female/non-binary actor, playing age late teens, comfortable with a Yorkshire accent.

Please read the additional info below and send headshots/showreel if available to **milliemaeperkins@gmail.com** if interested!

Thank you!

🎄 EARLY CHRISTMAS ELF CASTING – 2026 GROTTO CONTRACT 🎄
We're casting early (but necessarily!) for our magical Christmas Grottos across the UK – and we’re on the lookout for charismatic, professional Christmas Elves to join the team!

📆 Contract: November – December 2026
💸 Rate: Varies per venue, TBC via email 

📍 Locations: 
* Woburn Sands – Milton Keynes
* Willington – Bedfordshire
* East Bridgford – Nottinghamshire
* Bicester Avenue – Bicester
* Worlds End – Aylesbury
* Newbridge – Horsham
* Redfields – Hampshire
* Melbicks – Birmingham
* Harlestone Heath – Northampton
* St Mellons – Cardiff

✨ Requirements:
• Entry-level acting skills
• Basic script work and immersive performance ability
• Confident group singing of children’s Christmas songs

🧝‍♀️ We’re looking for:
• Confident, energetic performers with great improvisation skills
• Friendly, reliable team players
• Previous experience working with children or in character-based roles is a plus

📌 Important Info:
• Costume and full training provided
• Paid rehearsals and site visits will be scheduled in early November – exact dates TBC
• Below is the confirmed list of working dates and shift times (will vary per venue) :

✅ Shift Dates & Times

• Sat, Nov 14 - 9:30 AM to 5:00 PM

items.text:
Casting & Crew Call – Paid Social Media (TikTok) Shoot | London | 8 July
We are currently preparing a paid commercial social media (TikTok) shoot taking place on 8 July in London.
We are now casting talent and hiring additional crew members for the project.
1. Casting – Female Talent (Paid Role)
We are looking for two female talents/models based in London.
Ideal profile:
Age: late 20s to early 30s (we are especially interested in women in their early 30s)
European look female talent
Mature, confident, and professionally composed presence, while still maintaining warmth, approachability, and natural youthful energy
Must hold a valid driving licence
Comfortable performing on camera for social media content (TikTok-style commercial shoot)
Based in London
We are looking for women with a refined, elegant, and professionally confident on-screen presence.
2. Crew Needed
We are also looking to hire:
Makeup Artist (MUA)
Stylist
Still Photographer
For these roles, Mandarin-speaking ability is a strong advantage, as bilingual communication may be required on set.
We are looking for creatives with experience in commercial or social media production, who can work efficiently in a fast-paced, visually driven environment.
3. Application Requirements
If applying as talent (actors/models), please include:
Recent photos / digitals
Portfolio or showreel (if available)
CV / short introduction
If applying as makeup artist, stylist, or photographer, please include:
Portfolio
CV
Relevant past work examples
4. Contact
Please send all applications to:
kingsnow2001@hotmail.com
This is a paid project.
Further details regarding fee, call time, and production schedule will be shared with shortlisted applicants.
We look forward to hearing from you.

items.text:
**AUDITIONS FOR**

**TOIL AND TROUBLE**

**By Lauren Gunderson**

**At  Heart Repertory**

Toil and Trouble Synopsis.

Three underemployed friends—Adam, Matt, and Beth—decide that instead of going back to grad school or accepting dead‑end jobs, they’ll solve the recession by taking over a tiny South American island. Their half‑baked coup spirals when a fortune cookie convinces Matt he’s destined to rule and Beth becomes a little too enthusiastic with Macbeth‑style ambition and weaponry. Friendship, ego, and delusion collide in this fast, modern black comedy about power, fate, and very bad plans. Lauren Gundersons uber-capitalist hipster reimagining of Macbeth.

Performances are September 19, 20, 25, 26, 27; October 2, 3, 4

Audition Dates : Monday and Tuesday,  July, 20, 21. Callbacks Wednesday Jully 22.

For the audition please Prepare a 1- 2 minute comic monologue and bring picture and resume OR email it to the Director at  ‘lewiseric559@gmail.com.’

Rehearsals start August 17, we try to keep the schedule Monday-Thursday, 7:00PM- 10:00PM

There is a $225.00 Stipend.

Audition and Performance location: Sammamish Valley Grange Hall Address: 14654 148th Ave NE, Woodinville, WA 98072

Questions please contact the director Eric Lewis at lewwiseric559@gmail.com

**Character Breakdown**

**Matt (MacBeth) 25+35**

A history major with no prospects and even less direction, Matt is the skeptic of the trio—quick to puncture Adam’s theories but unable to generate any of his own. His moves from slacker cynicism to comic, self‑serious destiny‑seeker.

**Beth (Lady MacBeth) 25+35**

Smart, sharp‑tongued, and the only one with an actual job—until she loses it in a spectacular on‑air meltdown—Beth is the group’s most grounded member until ambition and frustration twist her into a modern Lady Macbeth. She’s bold, impulsive, and surprisingly dangerous once she gets “a little too handy with a dagger.”

**Adam (Everyone else) 25+35**

Adam treats life like a strategic business simulation. He clings to his MBA identity—literally wearing a tie at all times—and believes he’s destined for greatness despite being unemployed. His certainty masks deep insecurity, making him both ridiculous and oddly sympathetic.

 

SignUps.

We're using SignUp (the leading online SignUp and reminder tool) to organize our upcoming

Here's how it works in 3 easy steps: Click this link to see our SignUp on SignUp:

1)       https://signup.com/go/AucOXOZ

2) Review the options listed and choose the spot(s) you like.

3) Sign up! It's Easy - you will NOT need to register an account or keep a password on SignUp.

items.text:
🎬 Premiering October 4 at Syracuse International Film Festival! 🎬

✨ "Angry Girl Apartment" is an abrasive multi-digital-media visual music film that follows two girls navigating apartment disasters as they come up. When frustration builds, they must decide where to direct their energy. 

🎶 A rhythmic, animated exploration of girlhood, play, and chaos.

🌟 Director Biography: Corine is a Montreal-based filmmaker and animator inspired by the rhythm of music and the drawn image. A recent Film Animation graduate, she aims to tell stories through her unique animation style.

🗓️ Join us on October 4 for a special screening during the 23rd anniversary of Syracuse International Film Festival's 35mm to Digital Animation Day!
Don't miss it! 🎥✨

items.summary:
🎬 Premiering October 4 at Syracuse International Film Festival! 🎬

✨ "Angry Girl Apartment" is an abrasive multi-digital-media visual music film that follows two girls navigating apartment disasters as they come up. When frustration builds, they must decide where to direct their energy. 

🎶 A rhythmic, animated exploration of girlhood, play, and chaos.

🌟 Director Biography: Corine is a Montreal-based filmmaker and animator inspired by the rhythm of music and the drawn image. A recent Film Animation graduate, she aims to tell stories through her unique animation style.

🗓️ Join us on October 4 for a special screening during the 23rd anniversary of Syracuse International Film Festival's 35mm to Digital Animation Day!
Don't miss it! 🎥✨ 

#Animation #AnimationArtists #syracuseny #viralreelschallenge #trendingnow #capcut #syracuseinternationalfilmfestival #23yearsstrong #october #ThingsToDo #funnyreels
items.title: 🎬 Premiering October 4 at Syracuse International Film Festival! 🎬

Angela Boehm Casting is now casting a FEMALE STAND-IN for the Feature Film 'DRIFTER.' 

This project will be taking place in the Northeast, OH area.

Please read carefully below for details.

DETAILS:

Project: Feature Film 'DRIFTER'

Filming Location: Northeast, OH area

Shoot Dates:  Approximately 8 days during the shoot spread of July 15th through July 24th 2026.

*These dates are subject to change, so please only submit if you are FULLY AVAILABLE for ALL DATES with flexibility.*

Stand-In Rate: $128 for 8 hours

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

Stand-In

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: White

Age: 18+

Height: 5'5" - 5'7"

Weight: 100lbs - 120lbs

HOW TO SUBMIT:
In order to submit for this role, please send an email to team@angelaboehmcasting.com with the following information:

SUBJECT LINE: DRIFTER Female Stand-In - (YOUR FULL NAME)

PLEASE INCLUDE:

- Full Name

- Height

- Weight

- Phone Number

- 1 CURRENT Waist-Up or Headshot Photo

- 1 CURRENT Full-Body Photo

- Let us know of any past film or stand-in experience.

- Any conflicts on/around the shoot spread of July 15th through July 24th 2026.

***PLEASE REMEMBER: These dates are tentative and subject to change, so please only submit if you are FULLY AVAILABLE for ALL DATES with flexibility.***

PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting

Angela Boehm Casting is now casting paid Background EXTRAS for an upcoming film "Raleigh VS" filming in the WOOSTER, OH area for TWO DAYS on Friday, July 10th 2026 & Friday, July 24th 2026. (Talent will have the opportunity to work both dates, but will not be required to be considered for this project.)

*THIS WILL BE A PAID OPPORTUNITY!!*

This project will be taking place in the WOOSTER, OH Area (please don't submit if you are unable to work locally in Wooster).
Please read carefully below for details!

DETAILS:
Project: 'Raleigh VS'

Filming Location: WOOSTER, OH Area (MUST WORK LOCAL)

Shoot Date(s): Fri. July 10th, 2026 & Fri. July 24th, 2026

Pay rate: $75.00 FLAT RATE for 8 hours
(we understand this is a lower-paying job. This is a smaller film, though, and Production STILL wanted to make sure their Extras were paid, so we want to help send them great extras. If you want to get on set, network, and be part of a period feature film, feel free to continue with the form below!)

CLICK HERE TO SUBMIT: https://bit.ly/RVSABC

Angela Boehm Casting Team
PLEASE NOTE: This is just a submission. If you are booked, we will reach out to YOU.

Warszawa 05.07 i 06.07 

KONTYNUACJA

Na plan nowej komedii szukamy kobiet w wieku 18-40 do kontynuacji w dniach 5 i 6 lipca
TRZEBA BYĆ W OBA DNIA

Stawka 180zł/ dzień

Zgłoszenia zawierające
Nazwisko, imię, wiek, tel. i zdjęcia
Z tematem ,,567"
na maila julia@sceneria.com.pl

items.text:
**BRANDED SKIT CASTING CALL, NON-UNION - PAID**

***“BRANDED LAPTOP SKIT” ***

**Director:** Reangsei Phos & Kevin Jin Kwan Kim 

**Producers:** Brooke Fusick 

**Category:** Branded Skit

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Compensation:** $200. Food/crafty provided.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 11/12, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**Deadline to Submit:** Monday, July 6, 2026

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **onepointfive.collective@gmail.com** with the subject

heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo

reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE:** Our hero jumps through different time periods and universes in the search of finding their perfect laptop.

**Medieval Villagers ** -*** Any Age/Gender.*** ***SUPPORTING. ***A medieval crowd of villagers that are rowdy and unsophisticated. They boo and cheer at a public execution. We’re primarily seeking those that have messy and ungroomed hair and interesting faces.

**Retirement Home Elderly ** - ***Any Gender, age 60+. SUPPORTING.*** Elderly folks living at a retirement home that spend their days playing ping pong and building complex domino setups.

items.text:
CASTING CALL- Just B Productions - Cock by Mike Bartlett 

**Just B Productions** is holding auditions for their upcoming production of* COCK *by Mike Bartlett.

Directed by Thrasso Petras

November 26-29th at the Revue Stage, Granville Island.

*A good relationship is worth a good fight. *

*Cock,* the hit comedy by British playwright Mike Bartlett, is about John, a gay man, who has been in a relationship with his partner for seven years. But when he meets and falls in love with a woman, he is forced to contemplate the boundaries of his identity and decide what he really wants for his future. It is a hilarious and touching look at the difficulties that pop up when you realize you have a choice.

Please review the submission requirements below.

items.text:
🎭 PAID PERFORMER OPPORTUNITY – CAMBRIDGE AREA
We're looking for a male and female performer for a paid live event on Thursday 23rd July.

We're seeking performers with proven improvisation and/or immersive theatre experience who are confident interacting with the public and staying in character.

Requirements: • Local to Cambridge or within a reasonable driving distance • Access to a car • Available 10am–3pm • Strong improv and/or immersive performance experience

💷 £120 for a 5-hour booking (£24 per hour), plus mileage.

To express your interest, please send your Spotlight link (or CV and headshot) along with a brief summary of your relevant experience.

📱 WhatsApp: https://bit.ly/destinytalentcastings

📧 Email: info@destinytalent.co.uk

Please share with any suitable performers who may be interested.

items.text:
"The Anantapur Night" — Performance Update (First Week)
A 54-minute Telugu noir thriller, shot over 18 nights on a Sony FX3 with an all-fresher cast and crew, under a ₹5 lakh budget — released on GMS Gallery Films' YouTube channel on June 28, 2026.
Results in 7 days:
44.6K views (11x above typical performance)
7.9K hours of watch time
+240 new subscribers
66.1% of traffic driven by YouTube's suggested videos algorithm — indicating strong organic audience retention
Audience insights:
97.4% India, with early traction in the US, Kuwait, UAE, and Saudi Arabia
Nearly half of viewers watched on TV screens (44.3%) — suggesting deep, intentional viewing rather than casual mobile scrolling
Core audience: 25–44 age group, largely new viewers to the channel
A no-budget, fresher-led film out-performing typical channel benchmarks by 11x in its first week — proof that story and craft can travel even without star power or marketing spend.

items.summary:
"The Anantapur Night" — Performance Update (First Week)
A 54-minute Telugu noir thriller, shot over 18 nights on a Sony FX3 with an all-fresher cast and crew, under a ₹5 lakh budget — released on GMS Gallery Films' YouTube channel on June 28, 2026.
Results in 7 days:
44.6K views (11x above typical performance)
7.9K hours of watch time
+240 new subscribers
66.1% of traffic driven by YouTube's suggested videos algorithm — indicating strong organic audience retention
Audience insights:
97.4% India, with early traction in the US, Kuwait, UAE, and Saudi Arabia
Nearly half of viewers watched on TV screens (44.3%) — suggesting deep, intentional viewing rather than casual mobile scrolling
Core audience: 25–44 age group, largely new viewers to the channel
A no-budget, fresher-led film out-performing typical channel benchmarks by 11x in its first week — proof that story and craft can travel even without star power or marketing spend.

sharedPost.text:
🎪 LAST CALL CIRCUS 🎪

Created and performed by Anatoliy & Dmitry.

After years of performing in some of the finest circus and Cabaret productions across Europe and America, we were inspired to create something truly our own.

Last Call Circus is a brand-new 45-minute comedy and acrobatic show featuring two world-class jugglers. Filled with breathtaking skills, spectacular acrobatics, unexpected comedy, and nonstop energy, this show is designed to captivate audiences of all ages.

Every moment is crafted to surprise, entertain, and leave you wanting more.

Stay tuned for our upcoming performances—we can’t wait to share this unforgettable experience with you!

This is one show you won’t forget. See you soon! 🎭✨

#jugglinglife #show #circuscircus #camedy #best

items.text:
# 🎬 CASTING CALL – NO-BUDGET INDIE FEATURE FILM

We are currently casting **8 volunteer actors** for an upcoming independent feature film shooting in **Langley, BC**.

This is an excellent opportunity for actors looking to build their portfolio, gain valuable on-set experience, and collaborate with a passionate team of independent filmmakers.
## Roles Available

**4 Male Actors**
* Ethnicity: Indian
* Age: 30–40

**4 Female Actors**
* Ethnicity: Indian
* Age: 30–40
## Shoot Details

**Location:** Langley, BC

**Shoot Dates:**
* Saturday, July 25, 2026
* Sunday, July 26, 2026

**Time:** 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM (approximately)
## Compensation

This is a **volunteer (non-paid)** opportunity.

The following will be provided:
* Meals and refreshments
* Screen credits (IMDb, where applicable)
* Copy of the completed film for your demo reel (when available)
* Valuable experience working on an independent feature film
## How to Apply

Please send:
* Headshot
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel or self-tape
* Contact information

Selected applicants will receive additional information about the project and audition/self-tape requirements.
# Character Descriptions
## **Mukesh** (Male, 30–40) — **Lead Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **10 dialogues**

A fun-loving and outgoing individual who naturally takes charge in social situations. He has a dominant personality, struggles to accept opposing opinions, and often takes disagreements personally. While charismatic, he can also be vindictive when he feels wronged.

## **Payal** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **1 dialogue**

Mukesh's wife. Warm, cheerful, and easygoing, she understands her husband's strengths and flaws better than anyone. She isn't afraid to challenge him when he's in the wrong and often serves as the voice of reason.

## **Chirag** (Male, 30–40) — **Lead Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **10 dialogues**

Honest, fair, and good-natured. Chirag enjoys spending time with friends but prefers a peaceful, drama-free life. Calm, composed, and level-headed, he avoids unnecessary conflict whenever possible.

## **Neha** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **5 dialogues**

Chirag's wife. She presents herself as simple, calm, and soft-spoken, but beneath the surface she is adventurous, emotionally reactive, and full of surprises. She is exceptionally good at hiding this side of herself from others.

## **Ajay** (Male, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **2 dialogues**

Friendly and sociable on the surface but ultimately self-serving. He has no hesitation in getting close to people if it benefits him. Ego-driven and controlling, especially in his relationship with his wife, he likes to be in charge.

## **Disha** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** **No dialogue (featured performance)**

Ajay's wife. Genuine, kind-hearted, and always smiling. She enjoys having fun, treats everyone with respect, and never engages in gossip or speaks negatively about others. Calm, composed, and quietly resilient.

## **Rajiv** (Male, 30–40) — **Lead Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **8 dialogues**

Reserved, shy, and thoughtful. Rajiv enjoys being around friends but tends to stay in the background. Calm and composed, he is a quiet observer rather than the center of attention.

## **Jaya** (Female, 30–40) — **Supporting Role**

**Dialogue:** Approximately **1 dialogue**

Rajiv's wife. Gentle, warm, and soft-spoken. Like Rajiv, she is shy and reserved but enjoys social gatherings in a quieter way. She has a calm presence and a genuinely kind nature.

**Submission deadline 23rd July 2026.**

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LEAD ROLE 🎬

RED BRICK WAR is continuing its search for the lead role in our professionally produced proof-of-concept film.

We are currently looking for:

SONNY DOYLE

* Male
* Playing age: 35–45
* Authentic Liverpool (Scouse) accent essential
* Good physical condition (Essential)
* Strong dramatic ability
* Comfortable performing action sequences

Sonny is a former UK Special Forces operator who returns to Liverpool after his teenage nephew is left in a coma following a brutal gang attack. Quiet, disciplined and emotionally restrained, he carries years of experience, grief and determination beneath the surface.

No military experience is required. Professional weapons handling and tactical training will be provided before filming by our ex military staff & CQB instructors.

Please note: This is an unpaid proof-of-concept production created to showcase the project and secure investment for the feature film. Our aim is to produce work to the highest professional standard and build long-term relationships with the right cast and crew.

A huge thank you to everyone who has already submitted. We’ve received around 150 applications so far for various roles and are working our way through every single one. Every submission is being reviewed, and we’ll respond to everyone as soon as possible.

If you believe you’re right for Sonny Doyle, we’d love to hear from you.

Email: info@redbrickwar.co.uk
Website : www.redbrickwar.co.uk
Instagram : @redbrickwarfilm

items.text:
Happy Showreel Sunday,
My new comedy showreel, different from my dramatic one, hope y’all enjoy, any feedback tips etc I’m all open to it, comedy is subjective after all ✌️

topComments.text: Well done Brandan Power . I enjoyed this x

items.title: Showreel Sunday! Fun little scene with awesome comic Dan Thorn. Have a beautiful day everyone !

items.text:
Casting Director Monika Dalman!

Our old friend Monika is coming to play! We're interviewing her for our Free Acting Class Tuesday at 8:30 pm 

REGISTER HERE: https://www.screenactingschool.com/opt-in-1

-11 SAG shows in the pipeline

-Leading expert and casting director for verticals

-Casts all over the world
-Producer
-Parent of 2 successful young actors (who do well in school)
-Author (2 books)

I’d want to meet Monika just to find out how she does it all and does it well.

Actors - find out exactly what she looks for in an audition.

See you on Tuesday!

topComments.text: I highly recommend this acting class to all actors in the UK and internationally !
Im so excited for this! Its such a wonderful opportunity for all of the actors.

Casting Director Monika Dalman!

Our old friend Monika is coming to play! We're interviewing her for our Free Acting Class Tuesday at 8:30 pm 

REGISTER HERE: https://www.screenactingschool.com/opt-in-1

-11 SAG shows in the pipeline

-Leading expert and casting director for verticals

-Casts all over the world
-Producer
-Parent of 2 successful young actors (who do well in school)
-Author (2 books)

I’d want to meet Monika just to find out how she does it all and does it well.

Actors - find out exactly what she looks for in an audition.

See you on Tuesday!

items.text:
Szczegóły castingu z grafiki! 🎬👇
Do nowej zagranicznej reklamy poszukujemy osób o różnym pochodzeniu etnicznym, o bardzo dużych zdolnościach aktorskich. 💰✨
Kogo szukamy?
Dziewczynka (6-8 lat) – naprawdę zdolna aktorsko
Kobieta (35-45 lat)
Mężczyzna (38-50 lat)
Kobieta (55-75 lat) atrakcyjna
Dziecko (chłopiec lub dziewczynka) (6-12 lat) – poruszające się na wózku inwalidzkim
Ważne terminy:
Recall: 15.07 
Przymiarki: do ustalenia (tbc)
Dni zdjęciowe: 28, 29, 30 lipca

📩 Aby się zgłosić: Napisz do nas w wiadomości prywatnej (DM) bądź zgłoś się przez naszą stronę internetową castella.pl.
Zostaw swojego maila w wiadomości, a my wyślemy szczegóły do zgłoszenia. 
Zgłoszenia przyjmuję do poniedziałku do godz.20

items.text:
Szukasz swojej szansy przed kamerą? Dobrze trafiłeś! 🎬👇
Promujemy nowe twarze i otwieramy drzwi do świata reklam, filmów oraz seriali! Naszą misją jest dawanie możliwości osobom, które chcą spróbować swoich sił na planie.
W naszej agencji stawiamy na absolutną różnorodność i autentyczność. Niezależnie od tego, czy jesteś pochodzenia europejskiego, azjatyckiego, afrykańskiego – Twoja wyjątkowość to Twój największy atut! 🌍✨
Co warto wiedzieć?
Brak doświadczenia? Żaden problem! Stawiamy na naturalność i Twoją prawdziwą energię.
Wiek i wygląd: Szukamy ludzi w każdym wieku, o różnorodnej urodzie i unikalnym stylu.
Zrób pierwszy krok: Nie musisz być zawodowym aktorem ani modelem – wystarczy, że będziesz sobą!
📩 Jak do nas dołączyć? Napisz wiadomość prywatną (DM) bądź przez naszą stronę internetową castella.pl.
zdjęcie wygenerowane za pomocą AI Grok

🎯 Szukamy statystów z językiem niemieckim! 🇩🇪

Mówisz po niemiecku na poziomie komunikatywnym? Weź udział w próbach kamerowych do niemieckiego reality show! 
🎬 Tylko próby dla ekipy technicznej – nagrania nie będą emitowane.

📅 05.07.2026 (niedziela)
💸 400 zł brutto

📩 Zgłoś się przez formularz:
https://shortaudition.com/zgloszenie

lub wyślij mail na: casting@constantin-entertainment.pl
Tytuł: „niemiecki reality show”

Dołącz:
✅ kilka zdań o sobie w języku niemieckim (może być nagrane telefonem),
✅ i numer kontaktowy.

PROFESSIONAL CASTING – OTTAWA Women's Sportswear | JULY 27 & 28

We are looking for women between 18 and 40 years old for a professional photo shoot for the launch of a brand new activewear collection. All backgrounds welcome, no experience required.

Profile Age : 18 – 40 years old Height : 4'11" – 6'0" Size : S, M or L

Rate $450 – $700 CAD per day Travel & accommodation fully covered

How to apply Send to fursie.moda@gmail.com Full name, contact number and 4 recent natural photos. Subject : CASTING OTTAWA – First Name Last Name

Spots are limited.

#CastingOttawa #Activewear #WomensSportswear #ModelingOttawa #CastingCanada

items.text:
**E-Castings entscheiden heute oft darüber, ob du im Recall bist oder direkt den Job bekommst – oder eben nicht.**

In den letzten Monaten durfte ich den** E-Casting-Crashkurs** der **Media Impact Academy** bereits mehrfach exklusiv für **Models **und **Darsteller*innen** innerhalb ihrer Agenturen durchführen.

Das Feedback war so positiv, dass wir den Workshop jetzt auch für alle öffnen.

In dem Crashkurs geht es nicht darum, wie man "schöner spielt". Es geht darum, wie du vor der Kamera wirklich ankommst.

Wir arbeiten unter anderem an:
• deiner Präsenz vor der Kamera
• Stimme, Körpersprache und Wirkung
• authentischem Spiel mit Haltung statt "Vorspielen"
• den häufigsten Fehlern bei E-Castings
• technischen Basics, mit denen dein Casting sofort professioneller wirkt

Das Ganze ist sehr praxisorientiert. Wir drehen, analysieren und optimieren direkt vor Ort.

Der Crashkurs geht ca. 8 Std. und findet in Seminarräumen in Hamburg statt.

Ein paar **authentische Rückmeldungen** von Teilnehmer*innen haben mich besonders gefreut:

*„Hallo Achim, ich hoffe, es geht dir gut. *

*Ich wollte dir von meinen Fortschritten nach dem Workshop berichten. Ich war zweimal auf die Shortlist für ein paar Castings, und beim letzten habe ich sogar die Zusage bekommen. Heute hatte ich das Shooting – und das alles innerhalb eines Monats! Wahnsinn! Ich bin total begeistert und habe alles, was du uns beigebracht hast, konsequent geübt." *

*„..der Kurs war sehr hilfreich, um zu erkennen, wo ich meine Performance verbessern kann. Deine technischen Tipps zur Vorbereitung auf Castings sind definitiv sehr wichtig für ein optimales Ergebnis. Mir hat besonders gefallen, dass die Gruppe klein ist, sodass man sich individuell konzentrieren und gleichzeitig die Videos der anderen ansehen kann, um die Interaktion mit der Kamera zu optimieren. Ich nehme viele Tipps mit und hoffe, sie bei zukünftigen Castings anwenden zu können.“*

*"Ich fand den Crashkurs sehr wertvoll, um alte „e-Casting-Schalen” endlich mal platzen zu lassen. Darunter kam viel Neues zum Vorschein. Das war nicht nur irre, bei sich selbst zu erleben, sondern auch bei den anderen Teilnehmerinnen. Du hast das richtige Fingerspitzengefühl und eine besondere Kreativität, um auf jeden Charakter und Typ individuell einzugehen. Man hat nie Sorge, sich zu blamieren.“*

Da wir bewusst in kleinen Gruppen arbeiten, legen wir die Termine jeweils nach den eingehenden Anmeldungen fest. Wenn du Interesse hast, melde dich einfach unverbindlich bei mir. 

Sobald genügend Anmeldungen zusammengekommen sind, erhältst du die nächsten Termine.

Schreib mir einfach eine PN oder hinterlass einen Kommentar – dann schicke ich dir weitere Infos.

Ich freue mich auf euch!

**Achim Bramscher**
Media Impact Academy Hamburg

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'MEDIA IMPACT ACADEMY HAMBURG ዕየቅ1 人 MEDIA MEDIAIMPA IMPACT ACADEMY info@media-impact-academy.com www.mediaimpact-academy.com'

items.text:
Kennst du die Stimmen in deinem Kopf? 

Die, die sagt:

Du bist **zu alt**. Dabei wäre deine **Lebenserfahrung dein größter Vorteil.**

 

**Ohne Schauspielschule** geht nichts. Dabei fühlen sich Caster wirklich berührt, wenn du **echt** wirkst, anstatt perfekt.

 

Du hast **weder Zeit noch Geld**. Doch der erste Job würde dir direkt deine Investition wieder reinspielen.

 

Du bist **zu schüchtern, zu introvertiert, zu unsichtbar.. **Genau diese **Sensibilität** ist es, die einen Menschen vor der Kamera wirklich berührend macht.

 

Was wenn diese Stimme einfach nicht wäre?

Würdest du dann jetzt direkt losgehen?

Dann haben wir hier was für dich:

 

Das Casting Komplett Bundle **[https://go.castfinder.de/bundle/](https://go.castfinder.de/bundle/)** geht in den** Ausverkauf, denn wir verändern zukünftig unseren Fokus. **Wir wissen noch nicht, wann wir umstellen, daher sei jetzt schnell und sichere dir noch das Bundle.

 

Alles, was du brauchst, um den Weg zu gehen, von dem du vielleicht schon so lange träumst – gebündelt an einem Ort.

 

**✓ 12-wöchiger Onlinekurs „Mein Weg vor die Kamera" (Wert: 2.499 €)** – Schritt für Schritt zu deiner ersten Rolle: getestete Bewerbungsvorlagen, Coachingtools für deine Selbstvermarktung, plus unsere über Jahre gesammelte Bewerbungsliste mit Kontakten zu Castern, Agenturen und Produktionen.

**✓ 12-wöchiger Online-Schauspielkurs „RealReel" (Wert: 2.499 €)** – alle Fähigkeiten für professionelles Kameraschauspiel. Du lernst deinen Rollentyp kennen und arbeitest gezielt auf dein Showreel und deine Fotos hin.

**✓ Erfolgsbooster Bundle (Wert: 1.222 €)** – zwei komplette Workshop-Aufzeichnungen plus unser Schauspiel-Starterpaket für den (Quer-)Einstieg.

✓ Unsere besten Workshop-Aufzeichnungen (Wert: 499 €)

 

und wenn du bis zum 10.07. buchst, erhältst du noch meinen

Live-Workshop "**Essenz-Methode - Sprich aus deiner Seele und begeistere Menschen" **am 15.08.26 von 11-15:00 Uhr

mit mir on Top (Wert: 499 € )

 

Macht zusammen einen Wert von 7218 €. -**> Nicht für dich ;-)**

 

Du bekommst das komplette Bundle und

den Bonus Live Workshop für 997 €. (Ratenzahlung möglich) 

 

Kein Zufall, kein Glück, kein "vielleicht klappt's". Sondern das **gesamte Wissen** aus über **15 Jahren Casting- und Schauspielerfahrung**, in eine klare Reihenfolge gebracht, die wirklich funktioniert.

 

Ich weiß, was du vielleicht gerade denkst. Diese Gedanken kenne ich – aus jedem einzelnen Gespräch der letzten Wochen.

 

"Was, wenn es bei mir nicht klappt?"

 

Wie schon geschrieben: Darauf habe ich keine Garantie für dich. Die hat niemand. Aber ich habe etwas anderes: **Hunderte Menschen**, die mit denselben Zweifeln zu uns kamen – und **heute vor der Kamera stehen.** Nicht weil sie sich verändert haben. Sondern weil sie endlich den richtigen Weg kannten.

 

Das Angebot in dieser Form ist zeitlich begrenzt.

**[Sichere dir jetzt dein Bundle](https://go.castfinder.de/bundle/?utm_source=hs_email&utm_medium=email&_hsenc=p2ANqtz-_hhvZExVHxWSE41x6nqqtJRVBEwqq9fsAx2SuNeO0pGLCMrpZtztPR0Xlcucbw5dXDhUPX)****: **[https://go.castfinder.de/bundle/](https://go.castfinder.de/bundle/)

items.text:
HELLO GUYS!! THANK YOU ALL FOR YOUR SUBMISSIONS!  FRIDAY IS ALREADY FULL, BUT I STILL need 5 more slots for Sunday the 12th. 

Paper Background EXTRAS registration will be on set to Fill up!

🎬 CASTING CALL
BACKGROUND ACTORS / EXTRAS (10 SLOTS)

I know this is last minute, but we're looking for extras to be part of an exciting independent film!

🎥 Film: Between Two Lives

WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR:
• No specific gender or race requirements
• Ages 20–40
• Located in the Denver/Aurora area
• Comfortable appearing in multiple scenes and locations throughout filming

SHOOTING DATES & CALL TIMES:

  Friday, July 10, 2026  WE ARE GOOD FOR FRIDAY,  NEED MORE FOR SUNDAY 
🕖 Call Time: 7:00 AM
   Wrap time : 6pm

📍 Location details will be provided upon confirmation.

WARDROBE & SCENE INFORMATION

☕ Friday – Coffee Shop & Community Meeting Scenes
• Please dress as if you're going out to grab coffee with friends,  or simply enjoying a coffee.
• If you also want to be used for the community meeting scenes, please bring an additional outfit that is casual but appropriate for a young adults church gathering.

SUNDAY JULY 12TH
 🕖 Call Time: 7:00 AM. Breakfast/snacks 
🎬 Filming Begins: 7:30 AM
🏁 Estimated Wrap: 8:30 PM – 9:00 PM (subject to change based on production needs).

🎉 Sunday – Party Scenes
• Please bring stylish and fun party attire that is still decent and appropriate.
• No revealing clothing or club wear.

👕 Please bring 2–3 wardrobe options if possible.

Background actors may be used in multiple coffee shop, community, and party scenes throughout filming. Your characters are meant to feel like regulars at these places, so having different outfit options helps create variety and make the world of the film feel more real.

DETAILS:
• Unpaid (Volunteer)
• IMDb Credit & Film Credit Provided
• Meals and Snacks Provided

SUBMISSION DEADLINE:
  Thursday, July 9, 2026

TO APPLY:
📧 Email: rsmasraproductions@gmail.com
📩 Or (DM) on social media ( FB) 

Please include:
• Your name
• Age
• A recent photo/headshot
• Your availability for Friday and/or Sunday

📍 If selected, location details and additional information will be sent to you.

🎬❤️ Come be a part of this amazing story ❤️ 

BETWEEN TWO LIVES
A Solkem Studios Production

items.text:
I'm the director/ producer of the upcoming short film "Date Mate" shooting in Denver and I'm looking to fill a couple roles to round out the cast. Positions are unpaid but I will feed you well and it's a really fun romantic comedy script. Shooting July 24th and 25th, 8 hour days.

Misty (F, 20-30s) classic Colorado hippie type who is addicted to their vape pen and loves Pokemon 

Caitlin (F, 20-30s) cute, girl-next-door type with a love for filmmaking

Paige (F, 20-30s) mousy, cottage-core style woman with the secret skill of being a black belt in judo

topComments.text: I would love to be any of these!
Let me know if you have any male roles

items.text:
Casting call: Digital spot for RV Rental Company 

Looking for talent for an RV Rental shoot on Tuesday July 7 in the evening (~5pm to past sunset)

Location: Lakewood or Golden 

Looking for a real family with 2 adults and 2 kids ages ~6-12, and bonus points for a dog 🙂 

Lifestyle scenes around an RV/camping - would like to include biking and/or paddle board (I'll provide gear for that). Let me know if all are comfortable doing either. 

Rate: $2500 total for the group. 

Digital/global/perp

If you are interested, please email me (rileyjhanlon@gmail.com) with a group shot (preferred) or individual pics to show everyone, put “RV Spot - (your name)” in the subject. 

Thank you!

Location?

If you’ll have great makeup and hair done and don’t want it to go to waste, I can come by and take a few photos to capture your full look properly.

If you’re interested, please feel free to reach out and sign up. Spots are limited, so don’t hesitate to get in touch and secure your place.

items.title: 🎥Casting Call

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy - Horror Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat), (die Dreharbeiten sind im vollen Gange, und zu 95% abgedreht) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns eure Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text: This weekend only!

sharedPost.text:
🎬 CALLING ALL FILMMAKERS & SCREENWRITERS! 🎬

The 3rd Annual AMT International Film Festival is accepting submissions! We are bringing the magic of independent cinema right to the heart of the world: Times Square, NYC from October 22nd – 25th, 2026. 🗽✨

To celebrate 🇺🇸Independence Day🇺🇸 we’re giving you our biggest discount of the season.

🔥 FOURTH OF JULY SPECIAL: 50% OFF! 🔥
Get a massive 50% off your submission fee this weekend only. Don’t wait until the regular deadlines—lock in your entry now for half the price!

PROMO CODE: JULYWEEKEND50

DEADLINE: This offer expires on Monday, July 6th at midnight!

🎥 What We Are Accepting:
We want to see your unique voice, regardless of the budget or style. We are accepting all genres across the following categories:

✨ Feature Films

⏱️ Short Films

📹 Documentaries

🎨 Animation

🤖 AI Films

📝 Feature Screenplays

✍️ Short Screenplays

Whether you have a gripping drama, a mind-bending sci-fi, a stunning doc, or a cutting-edge AI project, AMT is your stage.

Ready to screen in Times Square? Head over to FilmFreeway now, submit your project, and use code JULYWEEKEND50 at checkout! 🎟️

#AMTFilmFest #IndieFilm #Filmmakers #Screenwriting
